style_effects: Subtle steam wisps rise from Chansey's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, casting sharp blue-white light that casts long, precise shadows. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, shimmering with a cold silver sheen under the ambient glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
